text.heading: poor State of roads in XXX
text.p: I wish to your attention to the deplorable roads condition in our area and seek your urgent attention in arresting the ugly situation. It is common knowledge that most public roads are not goods, two much of Accident and low development in our area , Has poses a great roads risk to inhabitant of . A visit to our roads reveals a rise in the number of dengerous accident. Some of the people died. the situation is so pathetic that one sees corpses in every corner of the hospital unattended to. I would like to suggest that You immediately call the erring to order. they should adopt a more civilized and decent way of roads. enough of the roads which reckless abandon. If this have been done I advise You should use police men at the roads for saving people life. I will appri- ciate Your timely response and action in tackling the roads risk threatening our very existence. I am confident that You will use your good office to reverse the ugly situation.
I thank You for Your usual - co-operation.
